creator: james@targetnet.com
text:
The port of ORBit in the tree is v0.4.93.  0.4.95 has been released, and
fixes a bug in using arrays in an IDL file.  No significant changes are
required to update the port.

The patch was sent to the maintainer, but the message bounced back as
undeliverable after several days.  Could someone please commit the change
rather than assigning it to the maintainer ?

Fix: Patch follows:
